name: Field-Service Workflow & Communication Suite
description: Generic productivity tools like Slack and Trello are failing specialized field industries (Trucking, Construction, Valet) due to search difficulties, paywalls for history, and lack of industry-specific logic.
pain_points: Data loss due to messaging history paywalls in generic tools
Inability to search attachments by sender or specific field context
Lack of industry-specific logic for vehicle check-ins and dispatching
Poor performance and freezing in offline or field environments
Steep learning curve for non-technical field workers using generic apps
